High_Marked_improvement.description: Number of patients with high skin infiltration showing marked improvement

High_Moderate_improvement.description: Number of patients with high skin infiltration showing moderate improvement

High_Slight_improvement.description: Number of patients with high skin infiltration showing slight improvement

High_Stationary.description: Number of patients with high skin infiltration with stationary response

High_Worse.description: Number of patients with high skin infiltration showing worse response

High_Total.description: Total number of patients with high skin infiltration, used as the denominator for calculating conditional percentages
